untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit volatility convergence measurement and options pricing models (straddle profitability threshold). Available indicators (hvol_20, india_vix) provide volatility proxies but cannot measure: (1) implied volatility directly, (2) straddle greeks and P&L, (3) convergence profitability threshold, (4) minimum spread width requirement. The signal logic requires options-specific calculations unavailable in price/technical indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses hvol_20 as historical volatility proxy and india_vix as implied volatility proxy. Entry requires historical vol > implied vol with meaningful spread. Exit triggers when convergence occurs (implied rises to meet historical). However, this is a simplified approximation; the original signal requires options pricing framework to validate straddle profitability at convergence targets.
